ddls:
CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager of the department */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated to the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the department */,
  "headcount" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary record */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Current salary level (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "salary1" INTEGER /* Actual salary amount */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the salary became effective */,
  "salary_grade" TEXT /* Salary grade */,
  "bonus" INTEGER /* Bonus amount */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the salary */,
  "next_review_date" TEXT /* Date of the next salary review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recruitment agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the recruitment agency */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the agency */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact at the agency */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the agency */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the agency's effectiveness */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the project belongs to */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated to the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project manager */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client or partner */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_projects" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee assigned to the project */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee in the project */,
  "hours_worked" INTEGER /* Total hours worked on the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the assignment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the assignment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_projects_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee being evaluated */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the evaluation */,
  "score" REAL /* Performance score */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the evaluator */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluator */,
  "evaluation_type" TEXT /* Type of evaluation */,
  "next_evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the next evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "satisfaction_scores" (
  "satisfaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each satisfaction score */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee providing the score */,
  "survey_date" TEXT /* Date of the survey */,
  "score" REAL /* Satisfaction score */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments from the employee */,
  "survey_type" TEXT /* Type of survey */,
  "next_survey_date" TEXT /* Date of the next survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("satisfaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "retention_records" (
  "retention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each retention record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the employee started working */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the employee left (if applicable) */,
  "reason_for_leaving" TEXT /* Reason for leaving (if applicable) */,
  "termination_reason" TEXT /* Detailed reason for leaving */,
  "termination_type" TEXT /* Type of termination */,
  "exit_interview_conducted" INTEGER /* Whether an exit interview was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("retention_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the role belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager responsible for the role */,
  "responsibilities" TEXT /* Detailed list of responsibilities for the role */,
  "required_skills" TEXT /* List of required skills for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., HR, Manager, Executive) */,
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee whose data was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
